tests.name: review outcome options separate docs from runtime
tests.expected: Checklist distinguishes merge docs/spec only, request integration data, request wording fix, and reject runtime expectation.

tests.name: diff review preserves allowed paths
tests.expected: Checklist allows only docs/pitch-v2, tests/pitch-spec, and CODEX_LIVE_PITCH_HANDOFF.md and lists forbidden runtime/UI paths.

tests.name: merge does not upgrade claims
tests.expected: Checklist says merging docs does not make overall/timing/live CLI/extension/generated CI/readiness/external integration/legal claims true.

tests.name: evidence packet fields gate live route
tests.expected: Checklist requires route, surface, source label, identifiers, artifact paths, downgrade labels, and measured timing rows where applicable.

tests.name: merge note preserves SPEC_ONLY status
tests.expected: Checklist provides merge wording that states the branch does not implement UI/runtime and does not set live demo timing or overall pass true.
